title: Apple Takes Legal Action Against OpenAI Over Stolen Secrets
subtitle: A major technology partnership turns into a courtroom battle as Apple accuses the AI firm of stealing confidential product designs.

summary.en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming the company stole trade secrets to build its own hardware. The legal action follows accusations that former Apple employees took sensitive information and product designs to their new jobs. OpenAI has denied the claims, stating they are focused on building innovative technology. This lawsuit marks a significant change in the relationship between the two companies, which previously worked together on AI integration. Apple is now seeking financial damages and a court order to stop OpenAI from using its private data.
summary.zh: 蘋果已對 OpenAI 提起訴訟，指控該公司竊取商業機密以開發自家硬體。此法律行動源於蘋果指控前員工將敏感資訊與產品設計帶往新職位。OpenAI 否認相關指控，表示公司專注於打造創新技術。這場訴訟標誌著兩家公司關係的重大轉變，雙方先前曾合作進行人工智慧整合。蘋果目前正尋求財務賠償，並要求法院下達禁制令，禁止 OpenAI 使用其私人數據。

paragraphs.en: In a major shift for the technology world, Apple has officially filed a lawsuit against the artificial intelligence firm OpenAI. The legal action, announced on Friday, claims that OpenAI stole trade secrets—confidential information that gives a company a competitive advantage—to help create its own hardware devices. This move marks a dramatic change in the relationship between the two tech giants, which had previously announced a major partnership in 2024 to bring ChatGPT to Apple devices.
paragraphs.zh: 科技界出現重大轉變，蘋果（Apple）已正式對人工智慧公司 OpenAI 提起訴訟。這項於週五宣布的法律行動指控 OpenAI 竊取商業機密，即那些能讓企業獲得競爭優勢的機密資訊，並利用這些資訊來協助開發自家的硬體設備。此舉標誌著這兩大科技巨頭之間的關係發生了劇烈變化，雙方曾於 2024 年宣布建立重大合作夥伴關係，將 ChatGPT 引入蘋果裝置。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian Technology, Apple alleges that OpenAI actively hired away Apple employees and encouraged them to share secret information, product designs, and other private data. An Apple spokesperson stated that significant evidence has emerged showing that individuals now working at OpenAI wrongly took confidential information regarding Apple’s unreleased technologies and processes. Apple is currently seeking financial damages and a court order to block OpenAI from keeping or using any of the stolen trade secrets.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報科技版》（The Guardian Technology）報導，蘋果指控 OpenAI 積極挖角蘋果員工，並鼓勵他們分享機密資訊、產品設計及其他私人數據。蘋果發言人表示，已有重要證據顯示，目前任職於 OpenAI 的人員不當獲取了關於蘋果尚未發布之技術與流程的機密資訊。蘋果目前正尋求財務賠償，並要求法院下達禁制令，禁止 OpenAI 保留或使用任何竊取的商業機密。

paragraphs.en: At the center of the lawsuit are several former Apple employees who now work for OpenAI. One person named in the complaint is Tang Yew Tan, who serves as OpenAI’s chief hardware officer. Apple claims that Tan encouraged job candidates to bring actual parts from Apple to their job interviews at OpenAI. The company alleges that this was done so that Tan and his team could look at the parts and ask for more secret information. Another former employee, Chang Liu, is accused of taking an Apple laptop when he left the company. Apple claims that Liu used a technical error to get into the company’s private network and downloaded dozens of files related to hardware development.
paragraphs.zh: 這起訴訟的核心涉及幾位目前任職於 OpenAI 的前蘋果員工。訴狀中點名的一位人士是擔任 OpenAI 硬體長（Chief Hardware Officer）的唐葉譚（Tang Yew Tan）。蘋果聲稱，譚鼓勵求職者在前往 OpenAI 面試時攜帶蘋果的實際零件。該公司指控此舉是為了讓譚及其團隊能檢視這些零件，並藉此索取更多機密資訊。另一位前員工劉昌（Chang Liu，音譯）則被控在離職時帶走了一台蘋果筆記型電腦。蘋果聲稱，劉利用技術漏洞進入公司私人網路，並下載了數十份與硬體開發相關的檔案。

paragraphs.en: This legal battle follows a period of growing tension between the two companies. Last year, OpenAI spent $6.4 billion to buy a hardware startup called io Products, which was started by Jony Ive, a famous former Apple designer. This purchase suggested that OpenAI was planning to move into the hardware market, a move that Apple now claims is built on a foundation of stolen secrets. In its complaint, Apple wrote that OpenAI’s new hardware business is "rotten to its core" because of its reliance on these misappropriated—or wrongly taken—materials.
paragraphs.zh: 這場法律戰發生在兩家公司緊張關係日益升溫之際。去年，OpenAI 斥資 64 億美元收購了一家名為 io Products 的硬體新創公司，該公司由知名蘋果前設計師艾夫（Jony Ive）所創立。這項收購顯示 OpenAI 計畫進軍硬體市場，而蘋果現在聲稱該計畫的基礎是建立在竊取的機密之上。蘋果在訴狀中寫道，OpenAI 的新硬體業務因為依賴這些被挪用（即不當取得）的材料，本質上已經「徹底腐敗」。

paragraphs.en: In response to the lawsuit, OpenAI has denied any wrongdoing. Drew Pusateri, a spokesperson for OpenAI, said that the company is currently reviewing the court documents. "We have no interest in other companies’ trade secrets," Pusateri added. He noted that OpenAI remains focused on building innovative technology that helps people everywhere. The company has not yet provided a detailed defense against the specific claims regarding the former employees or the downloaded files.
paragraphs.zh: 針對這起訴訟，OpenAI 否認有任何不當行為。OpenAI 發言人普薩特里（Drew Pusateri）表示，公司目前正在審閱法院文件。普薩特里補充說：「我們對其他公司的商業機密沒有興趣。」他指出，OpenAI 仍專注於打造能造福大眾的創新技術。該公司尚未針對有關前員工或下載檔案的具體指控提出詳細辯護。

paragraphs.en: This conflict is particularly surprising given the history of the two companies. In 2024, they announced a partnership to integrate ChatGPT into the operating systems for iPhones, iPads, and Macs. However, the relationship has clearly cooled. When Apple recently showcased its updated voice assistant, Siri, the AI component was based on Google’s Gemini model rather than ChatGPT. This change suggests that Apple had already begun to distance itself from OpenAI before the lawsuit was filed.
paragraphs.zh: 鑑於兩家公司的合作歷史，這場衝突顯得格外令人驚訝。2024 年，雙方宣布建立合作夥伴關係，將 ChatGPT 整合至 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 的作業系統中。然而，雙方關係顯然已經降溫。當蘋果近期展示其更新後的語音助理 Siri 時，其人工智慧組件是基於 Google 的 Gemini 模型，而非 ChatGPT。這項改變顯示在訴訟提起之前，蘋果就已經開始與 OpenAI 保持距離。

paragraphs.en: For Apple, the protection of its work is a top priority. The company spokesperson emphasized that their teams are constantly working to create breakthrough technologies and that protecting their intellectual property—the legal rights to their inventions and designs—is something they take very seriously. As the case moves forward, the technology industry will be watching closely to see how these claims are proven in court.
paragraphs.zh: 對蘋果而言，保護其研發成果是首要任務。該公司發言人強調，他們的團隊不斷致力於創造突破性技術，且保護智慧財產權（即對發明與設計所擁有的法律權利）是他們極為重視的事。隨著案件推進，科技產業將密切關注這些指控如何在法庭上獲得證實。

paragraphs.en: This legal fight comes at a busy time for OpenAI, which has recently been dealing with other challenges. Earlier this week, the company released its newest AI model, ChatGPT 5.6, following a delay caused by government security concerns. The United States government had previously asked the company to limit access to the tool to ensure it was safe for the public. With the new lawsuit now added to the mix, OpenAI faces pressure from both government regulators and one of the world’s largest technology companies. For now, the future of the partnership between Apple and OpenAI appears to be over, replaced by a high-stakes battle in the courtroom.
paragraphs.zh: 這場法律戰對 OpenAI 來說正值忙碌時期，該公司近期一直在處理其他挑戰。本週稍早，在政府基於安全考量而延後發布後，該公司推出了最新的 AI 模型 ChatGPT 5.6。美國政府先前曾要求該公司限制對該工具的存取，以確保其對大眾是安全的。隨著這起新訴訟的加入，OpenAI 正面臨來自政府監管機構與全球最大科技公司之一的雙重壓力。目前看來，蘋果與 OpenAI 之間的合作關係似乎已經結束，取而代之的是法庭上高風險的對決。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To persuade someone to leave their current job to work for your company instead.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 挖角；透過提供更好的條件吸引員工跳槽。
keyTerms.noteZh: 此片語由 hire 和 away 組成，強調從原公司「挖走」人才。文中：Apple alleges that OpenAI actively hired away Apple employees and encouraged them to share secret information, product designs, and other private data.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To become less friendly, enthusiastic, or intense.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡並非指物理上的降溫，而是形容兩家公司合作關係的惡化。文中：However, the relationship has clearly cooled.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Completely dishonest or corrupt from the very beginning or foundation.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 徹底腐敗；從根源上就壞掉了。
keyTerms.noteZh: 這是一個比喻用法，形容事物本質極度惡劣。文中：In its complaint, Apple wrote that OpenAI’s new hardware business is "rotten to its core" because of its reliance on these misappropriated—or wrongly taken—materials.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A combination of different things or factors.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（混合），這裡作名詞指代複雜的局勢。文中：With the new lawsuit now added to the mix, OpenAI faces pressure from both government regulators and one of the world’s largest technology companies.

sources.name: The Guardian Technology
sources.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging artificial intelligence company stole trade secrets

previousArticles.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Alleged Theft of Trade Secrets
previousArticles.summaryEn: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing the company of stealing confidential product information. The legal action follows claims that former Apple employees took sensitive data when moving to the AI firm. Apple alleges that this stolen information is being used to help OpenAI enter the consumer hardware market. OpenAI has denied these claims, stating that it has no interest in other companies' trade secrets. This lawsuit marks a major change in the relationship between the two former technology partners.

previousArticles.title: OpenAI Releases New AI Model Amid Government Security Concerns
previousArticles.summaryEn: OpenAI has officially released its newest AI model, ChatGPT 5.6, following a delay caused by US government security concerns. The Trump administration previously requested that the company limit access to the tool to ensure it was safe. This decision follows similar restrictions placed on other AI firms like Anthropic. The US government is currently trying to balance the need for rapid technological progress with the risks of cyber-attacks. Both OpenAI and Anthropic are preparing for major financial milestones as they compete for leadership in the AI industry.

previousArticles.title: OpenAI Releases New ChatGPT Model After Government Review
previousArticles.summaryEn: OpenAI has officially released its newest AI model, ChatGPT 5.6, to the public. The launch follows a period of restricted access while the US government reviewed the technology for cybersecurity risks. Alongside the new model, OpenAI introduced a tool called ChatGPT Work to help users manage daily tasks. The company hopes this release will help it stay ahead of competitors in the global AI market. This development marks a significant step in the ongoing race to create more powerful and useful artificial intelligence.

quiz.question: What specific action does Apple allege Chang Liu took when leaving the company?

options.A: He shared secret product designs with Tang Yew Tan.
options.B: He used a technical error to access and download private hardware files.
options.C: He stole a prototype of a new hardware device during his interview.
options.D: He helped OpenAI purchase a hardware startup founded by Jony Ive.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，Apple 指控 Chang Liu 利用技術錯誤進入公司私人網路，並下載了數十個與硬體開發相關的檔案。選項 A 雖然提到了 Tang Yew Tan 的不當行為，但並未說明 Liu 與其分享設計；選項 C 描述的是對 Tang Yew Tan 的指控，而非 Liu；選項 D 是關於 OpenAI 收購 io Products 的情節，與 Liu 的個人行為無關。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the status of the Apple-OpenAI partnership before the lawsuit was officially filed?

options.A: It was stronger than ever because Apple integrated ChatGPT into Siri.
options.B: It was already deteriorating, as evidenced by Apple's shift toward Google's technology.
options.C: It was temporarily paused by the U.S. government due to security concerns.
options.D: It was legally terminated by OpenAI because of the conflict over trade secrets.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第六段，雖然兩公司曾宣布合作，但 Apple 在更新 Siri 時改用了 Google 的 Gemini 模型而非 ChatGPT，這顯示在訴訟前雙方關係就已轉冷。選項 A 與文意相反；選項 C 提到的政府安全疑慮是針對 ChatGPT 5.6 的發布，而非針對合作關係；選項 D 文中並未提及 OpenAI 主動終止合作，而是描述 Apple 逐漸疏遠。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the phrase 'rotten to its core' imply about OpenAI's new hardware business?

options.A: It is based entirely on unethical or illegal practices.
options.B: It is physically poorly constructed and likely to fail.
options.C: It is an outdated business model that cannot compete with Apple.
options.D: It is a secret project that has not yet been revealed to the public.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到 OpenAI 的硬體業務是「rotten to its core」，是因為其依賴於「misappropriated」（被非法挪用）的材料，意指其基礎完全建立在不正當手段上。選項 B 誤將「rotten」理解為物理上的損壞；選項 C 與競爭力無關，而是強調道德瑕疵；選項 D 雖然該業務可能涉及秘密，但該片語強調的是本質上的腐敗，而非保密狀態。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of this article?

options.A: To explain the technical innovations found in the new ChatGPT 5.6 model.
options.B: To describe the history of Jony Ive's hardware startup, io Products.
options.C: To discuss the legal battle between Apple and OpenAI over stolen trade secrets.
options.D: To analyze how the U.S. government regulates artificial intelligence firms.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。整篇文章的核心在於報導 Apple 對 OpenAI 提起訴訟，內容涵蓋訴訟原因、涉及的前員工、雙方關係的破裂以及對未來的影響。選項 A 僅是文末提到的背景資訊；選項 B 僅是背景中的一個細節；選項 D 雖然提到政府監管，但那只是 OpenAI 面臨的眾多挑戰之一，並非本文的主題。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
